privacyPolicy.title: Your privacy matters to Yummy
privacyPolicy.introduction: Yummy ("we", "our", or "us") operates the Yummy mobile application and related services. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and protect your information when you use our application and services. By using Yummy, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this policy.

subsections.title: 1.3 Location Information (Optional)
items: Approximate or precise location for attendance or business verification purposes
Location access is optional and used only when required for specific features.

sections.title: 3. Data Sharing & Disclosure
sections.content: We do not sell or rent your personal data. We may share data only:
items: With trusted service providers (e.g., hosting, analytics)
To protect our legal rights and platform security

sections.title: 4. Data Security
sections.content: We take reasonable measures to protect your data including:

sections.title: 5. Data Retention
sections.content: We retain data only as long as necessary:
sections.footer: You may request deletion of your data at any time.

sections.title: 6. User Rights
sections.content: You have the right to:
sections.footer: To request changes, contact us at support@yummyever.com

sections.title: 7. Children's Privacy
sections.content: Yummy is not intended for children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children.

sections.title: 8. Third-Party Services
sections.content: We may use third-party services such as:
sections.footer: These services have their own privacy policies.

sections.title: 9. Changes to This Policy
sections.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page.

sections.title: 10. Contact Us
sections.content: If you have questions or concerns:

termsAndConditions.title: Terms for using the Yummy platform
termsAndConditions.introduction: Welcome to Yummy! By accessing or using the Yummy mobile application or website, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By using this application, you agree to comply with these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the app.

sections.title: 2. Use of the Application
sections.content: You agree to:
items: Use the app only for lawful purposes
Not misuse or attempt to disrupt the system

sections.title: 3. Account Responsibility
sections.content: You are responsible for:
sections.footer: We are not responsible for unauthorized access caused by user negligence.

sections.title: 4. Service Availability
sections.content: We aim to provide uninterrupted service but do not guarantee continuous availability or error-free operation. Service may be temporarily suspended for maintenance or upgrades.

sections.title: 5. Intellectual Property
sections.content: All content including logos, design, source code, text, and graphics belongs to Yummy and may not be copied or reused without permission.

sections.title: 6. Termination
sections.content: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms, abuse the platform, or engage in illegal activity.

sections.title: 7. Limitation of Liability
sections.content: Yummy shall not be liable for business losses, data loss, or indirect or incidental damages. Use of the app is at your own risk.

sections.title: 8. Changes to Terms
sections.content: We may update these terms at any time. Continued use of the app means acceptance of updated terms.

sections.title: 9. Governing Law
sections.content: These terms shall be governed by the laws of Nepal.

cookiesPolicy.title: How Yummy uses cookies
cookiesPolicy.introduction: This Cookie Policy explains what cookies are and how Yummy uses them on our website and application. We use cookies to enhance your experience and provide a personalized service.

sections.title: 1. What Are Cookies?
sections.content: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help us remember your preferences, understand how you use our platform, and improve your experience.

subsections.title: 2.1 Essential Cookies
subsections.content: Required for the website to function properly. These cannot be disabled.

subsections.title: 2.3 Analytics Cookies
subsections.content: Help us understand how visitors interact with our website.

subsections.title: 2.4 Marketing Cookies
subsections.content: Used to deliver relevant advertisements and track campaign effectiveness.

sections.title: 3. Third-Party Cookies
sections.content: We may use cookies from third-party services:
items: Google Analytics - for website traffic analysis
Social media plugins - for sharing features
sections.footer: These third parties have their own cookie policies.

sections.title: 4. Managing Cookies
sections.content: You can control cookies through your browser settings:
items: Allow cookies from specific sites only
Set preferences for different types of cookies
sections.footer: Note: Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.

sections.title: 5. Cookie Retention
sections.content: Different cookies are stored for different periods:
items: Session cookies - deleted when you close your browser
Persistent cookies - stored for up to 1 year
Analytics cookies - typically stored for 26 months

sections.title: 6. Updates to This Policy
sections.content: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date.

sections.title: 7. Contact Us
sections.content: If you have questions about our use of cookies:
